name: Cabbage Rolls with Sour Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups leftover meat or ground beef (seasoned with salt & pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Brown meat and onion in a heavy skillet over low heat. Remove from heat.
3. Mix thoroughly celery, rice, horse-radish, mustard, and egg with the meat mixture.
4. Cook cabbage leaves for 3 minutes in boiling salted water.
5. Place meat mixture on cabbage leaves. Roll and secure with toothpicks.
6. Arrange rolls close together in a greased baking dish.
7. Pour tomato puree and water over the cabbage rolls.
8. Cover and bake for 30 minutes.
9. Remove cabbage rolls. Pour sour cream into the remaining liquid in the baking dish.
10. Serve over cabbage rolls.
